videos.title: HTML Ordered Lists Explained
videos.description: Complete guide to ordered lists including type, start, reversed attributes and nesting.

videos.description: Learn how CSS counters work for creating custom ordered list numbering schemes.

videos.description: Brad covers ordered and unordered lists with attributes, nesting, and CSS styling.

videos.description: Kevin demonstrates how to style list markers including the ::marker pseudo-element.

videos.description: Build a multi-step form with progress indicator using ordered lists and JavaScript.

videos.description: Deep dive into CSS counter techniques for legal document section numbering.
